refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution
Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

candidate_dps: Redundant system components and failover mechanisms
Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance
Robust fault detection and automated recovery procedures
selected_dp.selected_dp: Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance

potential_sources: Dependency on telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
Interaction with Safety Services for fault alerts
coupling_check.notes: DP logically centralizes availability management via monitoring and maintenance, minimizing cross-module coupling.

assumptions_risks: Telemetry data is reliable and timely
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating fault recovery procedures explicitly in DP to cover rapid recovery aspect.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized management of availability through monitoring, maintenance, and coordination of vehicle and teleoperation components

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time health and status data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Exchanges safety-related fault alerts with Safety Services

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends maintenance and recovery task commands to Vehicle and Teleoperation

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment due to centralized monitoring and control; low diffusion as interfaces are well-defined.
Vehicle provides telemetry but does not contain availability logic.
Teleoperation provides telemetry and tasking interface but no containment of availability logic.
Safety Services interacts via alerts but does not contain availability logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability management in NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from other modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution and consider modularizing monitoring and recovery submodules if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: DP logically addresses the refined FR by focusing on real-time monitoring and predictive maintenance to meet availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry interface dependency on Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
SafetyAlert interface coupling with Safety Services
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment is strong in NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified through system uptime metrics collected via Telemetry interface.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability logic to NGHE Solution module with explicit interface dependencies.

recommended_revisions: Explicitly incorporate fault recovery procedures in DP refinement.
Plan for modularization within NGHE Solution if complexity increases.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments sufficiently address the availability KPI with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Interfaces and containment are well defined with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution
Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

revise.why: To explicitly include fault recovery mechanisms alongside monitoring and predictive maintenance.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely
open_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Dependency on telemetry data quality and latency
evidence_needed: Availability measurement data over evaluation period
